user_query: I'm planning a camping trip to a remote area. Please fetch the positions of the Sun, Moon, and Mars for the next 5 days. Also, provide me with a list of stars in the constellation Orion with an apparent magnitude brighter than 3.

TaskList.description: Fetch the positions of the Sun, Moon, and Mars for the next 5 days.
Fetch the list of stars in the constellation Orion that have an apparent magnitude brighter than 3.
